there's a lot of competition in this

they're unmistakably pixel you've got

new color this one is a sage green

so it's a bit slimmer it doesn't

the speakers and the slightly off center

it's all back on the inside though this
phone is ip67 not ip68 and there is no

here but this phone still has a glass
back and
i don't know if you've used wireless

then also the pixel 5a had a headphone
jack this pixel 6a
does not have a headphone jack so again
if you use that then that's another

actually most reflects its price so
we've got a 6.1 inch flat 1080p oled

reader

decently sharp with good color and it

rainbowing and the auto brightness is a

specifically because
this one
feels slow actually let me be more
specific so
this is a 60hz display there's lots of

but for whatever reason the
responsiveness and the actual smoothness
